MiniMax Hailuo vs Adobe Firefly

Compare MiniMax Hailuo and Adobe Firefly: free credits, features, and ratings. Which one is right for you?

MiniMax Hailuo

By MiniMax, natural motion effects that don't look AI-generated. 300 free credits on signup, generous for its category.

Pros

  • ✓Most natural motion
  • ✓Generous free credits
  • ✓Some videos without watermark
  • ✓Available in China

Cons

  • ✗Only 5-6 seconds
  • ✗Complex scenes may fail

Key Features

Natural motionImage to VideoText to VideoUp to 1080p300 credits for new usersOptimized human motion
View Details →

Adobe Firefly

Adobe's AI painting tool, safest for commercial use. 25 free credits/month, commercially safe images.

Pros

  • ✓Zero commercial risk
  • ✓Adobe quality guarantee
  • ✓Seamless Photoshop integration
  • ✓Fine quality

Cons

  • ✗Only 25 credits/month
  • ✗Requires VPN for China
  • ✗Less creative flexibility than SD

Key Features

Text to ImageImage to ImageGenerative FillStyle ReferencePhotoshop integration
View Details →
